destinations.evidence: Nodebuilder constructs BlockVerifier through new_with_evm_classification and passes the full Ritual EthEvmConfig built with RitualEvmFactory.

equivalence_argument: In the v2.2 architecture, nodebuilder owns executor construction. Passing the same EthEvmConfig into new_with_evm_classification preserves verifier EVM classification and async validation support on the active node path.
notes: This is mapped in the nodebuilder dependency because the active v2 node executor is assembled there.
rationale: The primary diff removes the ad hoc EVM environment factory and switches from new_with_async_validation to new_with_evm_classification, passing evm_config directly. The diff removes the environment-factory-only BlockVerifier construction and replaces new_with_async_validation with new_with_evm_classification(evm_config.clone()), with comments stating this enables EVM simulation for sequencing rights and async validation. Collapsed 2 closely related historical candidate statements into the latest effective formulation.
statement: The node executor must construct BlockVerifier with new_with_evm_classification and pass the full Ritual EthEvmConfig so block verification can perform EVM simulation/classification for sequencing-rights call graph analysis in addition to async commitment validation.
suggested_falsification_tests: Instantiate nodebuilder's executor path and assert the BlockVerifier is built through new_with_evm_classification with the same EthEvmConfig used by RitualEvmFactory; verify sequencing-rights EVM classification is available during block verification.

Start a node with this executor path and assert the BlockVerifier receives an EVM config capable of running classification simulations; a sequencing-rights verification scenario that requires call graph simulation should use the EVM classification path rather than failing due to missing EVM factory/config.
summary: Nodebuilder constructs BlockVerifier with EVM classification.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Instantiate nodebuilder's executor path and assert the BlockVerifier is built through new_with_evm_classification with the same EthEvmConfig used by RitualEvmFactory; verify sequencing-rights EVM classification is available during block verification.
title: BlockVerifier is constructed with EVM classification
